use_cases: Adds a dynamic liquid cursor that stretches and morphs based on mouse movement direction and speed
Provides visual click feedback with scale and bounce animations
Creates engaging micro-interactions for portfolio and showcase websites
Enhances brand identity with a fluid, physics-based custom cursor
Delivers smooth mouse tracking with direction-aware stretching effects
ai_summary: A sophisticated custom cursor component that uses GSAP animations to create a liquid, physics-based pointer effect. The cursor follows the mouse with smooth interpolation, stretches dynamically based on movement direction and speed, and features a bounce animation on click. Ideal for modern web applications and creative portfolios seeking distinctive cursor interactions.
